title: No Seriously Asuka Could Have Had An Attraction To Rei
display_title: No Seriously Asuka Could Have Had An Attraction To Rei
wikitext:
[]: No Seriously, Asuka Could Have Had An Attraction To Rei Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:20 pm Okay, just please please dont bash me for this! I think Asuka could have at least had some kind of romantic attraction for Rei. Considering Asuka saw Rei completely as a doll, maybe that was probably the closest thing to Asuka since her mother died at met Rei. Sorry if this isn't making any sense >< This idea is probably only valid in a completely differen universe to be honest...

[]: Post by Defectron » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:27 pm Considering Asuka saw Rei completely as a doll, maybe that was probably the closest thing to Asuka since her mother died at met Rei. Sorry if this isn't making any sense ><

[]: Re: No Seriously, Asuka Could Have Had An Attraction To Rei Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:35 pm CazMu wrote: Okay, just please please dont bash me for this!

[]: Re: No Seriously, Asuka Could Have Had An Attraction To Rei Post by skikes » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:42 pm CazMu wrote: Okay, just please please dont bash me for this! I think Asuka could have at least had some kind of romantic attraction for Rei. Considering Asuka saw Rei completely as a doll, maybe that was probably the closest thing to Asuka since her mother died at met Rei. Sorry if this isn't making any sense >< This idea is probably only valid in a completely differen universe to be honest...

[]: Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:45 pm I already new all this...I just thought maybe it could have been another possibilty. I new Asuka hated Rei because she was a doll but I just thought maybe it could have been oppisite in a much much deeper way. Like I said this is probably a scenario in a completely different univers...gahhhh I knew i was gonna get bashed >< But anyways eva can interpretated in anyway the viewer wants ;)

[]: Post by skikes » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:56 pm CazMu wrote: I already new all this...I just thought maybe it could have been another possibilty. I new Asuka hated Rei because she was a doll but I just thought maybe it could have been oppisite in a much much deeper way. Like I said this is probably a scenario in a completely different univers...gahhhh I knew i was gonna get bashed ><

[]: Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:01 pm meehhh fine >.< ill shut up now

[]: Post by Oz » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:25 pm Skikes, that's just unnecessarily harsh. Besides, it was assumed that the "interpretation" was focused on the content - and interpreting the sky as green has nothing to do with that. As for the subject itself, I don't see where we could go with this. Being attracted to men doesn't immediately rule out Asuka's interest in women, but I don't think that would affect the way we understand the character. It might be an interesting point for a A/R fanfic, but for canon, it doesn't really matter. This is certainly better than anything J_Faulkner wrote because CazMu at least found a solid (if questionable) argument for the idea. Fanwanking is fine as long as it isn't taken too seriously.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:33 pm CazMu wrote: But anyways eva can interpretated in anyway the viewer wants ;)

[]: Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:38 pm Okay. I agree eva monkey its just I was just think of different interpritations instead of the same old ones. I never said what i said was right or any way near the actual relationship between Asuka and Rei. Sorry I didn't mean to offend anyone

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:38 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka's character is completely selfish in that she lives for herself, whereas Rei lives for others, to the exception of herself. Rei and Asuka are total polar opposites.

[]: Post by skikes » Fri Apr 16, 2010 1:56 pm Oz wrote: Skikes, that's just unnecessarily harsh.

[]: Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:00 pm Jeez! Okay Im sorry for making the whole statement in the first place. I dont really care now, I just dont understand why every goes completely over the top when a 'way out there' theory is suggested. I know Im expecting a reply such as 'oh well the whole conecpt of Asuka liking Rei is impossible thats why were going over the top or something'. Most people here don't accept other theories that may be impossible and I don't understand why. I thought this would be quite a decent forum to join and I've only been here a week *sigh*

[]: Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:03 pm Gendo[on the phone, obviously drunk]: Rei, it appears that the Second Children will require an emotional crutch to maintain her combat readiness. Effective immediately you are to begin a romantic relationship with Pilot Shoryu. You are authorized to engage in sexual activities if necessary. Rei: Understood. Gendo: Wait, what was that? [Fuyuutsuki inaudible mumbling, slurred] Gendo: Oh, yes. Of course. Rei, if sex is required it is necessary that you videotape the proceedings to protect NERV from potential lawsuit. Or something like that. Rei: ... Gendo: Just do it. Rei: ...Yes, Sir.

[]: Post by CazMu » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:07 pm [quote]Gendo[on the phone, obviously drunk]:1c7jn7c0 Rei, it appears that the Second Children will require an emotional crutch to maintain her combat readiness. Effective immediately you are to begin a romantic relationship with Pilot Shoryu. You are authorized to engage in sexual activities if necessary. Rei:1c7jn7c0 Understood. Gendo:1c7jn7c0 Wait, what was that? [Fuyuutsuki inaudible mumbling, slurred] Gendo:1c7jn7c0 Oh, yes. Of course. Rei, if sex is required it is necessary that you videotape the proceedings to protect NERV from potential lawsuit. Or something like that. Just do it. Rei:1c7jn7c0 ...Yes, Sir. [/quote] You do not understand how hard I lol'd at that XD Oh and skikes sorry for comment I misread this [quote](Casmu, i'm really not attacking you, i'm just expressing my differing opinion, there is really no need to apologise) [/quote]

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:11 pm Good night, and good luck.
